name: Tofu Chop Suey
recipeInstructions:
1. Season with freshly ground pepper and salt to taste.
2. Tofu provides the protein, similar to chicken breasts, in this quick-to-prepare colorful vegetarian main dish.
3. Drain tofu, cut into 3/4-inch pieces. Place between layers of paper towel and weight down with a dinner plate. Let stand for 10 minutes to compress and remove excess water.
4. Heat oil in a frying pan. Add 2 tablespoons of chicken broth and ground ginger. Cook over medium heat.
5. Add celery, onion, and red pepper. Stir-cook for 3 minutes.
6. Add bean sprouts and continue stir-cooking for 1 minute.
7. Stir in the remaining chicken broth, soy sauce, and tofu. Cook gently over medium heat until vegetables are tender-crisp and liquid is evaporated. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
(Note: This recipe serves 3/4 cup; contains 194 calories, 13 grams of carbohydrate, 13 grams of protein, 10 grams of fat. Includes 1 fruit & veg. choice, 2 protein choices, and 1 fats & oils choice.)
